title: Kaatre Un Kaladiyai (Dope Track)  Pyaar Prema Kadhal Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaatre un kaladiyai
naan thedi.
kanne naan kaathirundhen
kanmoodi.

idhu enna pudhu kaalam
ennodu.
kulirodu anal veesum
nenjodu.

kalangarai vizhakkena
vazhgiren naane.
thanimaiyum uravena
theigiren naane.

nadhigalil nilavadhu
dhinam dhinam nanaiyudhu
irundhum karaigal
neengaathe.

kadarkarai suvadugal
azhagiya nimidangal
nilaipadhu yedhadi.

nizhal adhuthaan pirigirathe
nijam adhuthaan maraigirathe
kannum kannum thavikkirathe
ondrai ondru tholaikirathe

solladi kanmani
neeyum enna dhevathai
siraginai virikka
marandhaaye

nilladi ponmani
neeyum enna penno
aann manam thavikka
parandhaaye.

nadhigalil nilavadhu
dhinam dhinam nanaiyudhu
irundhum karaigal
neengaathe.

kadarkarai suvadugal
azhagiya nimidangal
nilaipadhu yedhadi.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kaatre Un Kaladiyai?

The song explores themes of longing and introspection, capturing the emotional journey of the protagonist.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

Yuvan Shankar Raja is both the singer and the music director of this track.

What is the context of the song in the movie Pyaar Prema Kadhal?

The song reflects the protagonist's feelings of solitude and yearning for connection.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kaatre Un Kaladiyai?

The lyrics were penned by Mohan Rajan.

When was the song released?

The song was released on June 10, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kaatre Un Kaladiyai is a soulful melody from the movie Pyaar Prema Kadhal, capturing the essence of longing and introspection. Sung and composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, the song beautifully conveys the protagonist's solitude and yearning for love. The lyrics by Mohan Rajan add depth to the emotional narrative, making it a poignant piece in the film. This track evokes a sense of melancholy and romance, perfect for moments of reflection and emotional connection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Kaatre Un Kaladiyai from Pyaar Prema Kadhal is a mesmerizing track that beautifully blends Yuvan's soulful voice with his own enchanting music composition. The song captures the essence of longing and introspection, making it a standout piece in the film's soundtrack. Dive into this emotional journey and experience the magic of Yuvan's musical genius.
stanzaMeanings: I searched for your footsteps in the wind. I waited with my eyes closed.
What is this new time with me? My heart feels both cold and warm.
I live like a lighthouse on a rocky shore. I feel lonely, yet connected.
The moonlight on the river gets wet every day, but the shores never leave.
The beautiful moments on the seashore, when will they settle?
Shadows are separating, truth is disappearing, eyes are restless, one by one things are fading.
Tell me, dear, what kind of angel are you? You forgot to spread your wings.
Stop, golden girl, what kind of woman are you? You flew away, leaving a man's heart restless.
The moonlight on the river gets wet every day, but the shores never leave.
The beautiful moments on the seashore, when will they settle?
